A few years ago there was Queen Anne's Lace growing wild behind the building. I assume there still is. The apple tree is on the strip of land bordering Bartlett Street. Falling Fruit season: June-October.

50-tree public orchard stewarded by Gather to Grow Maine and ReTreeUS. Apples, pears, peaches, plums, among others, are the mainstay of this orchard. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
Go left onto the walking path (part of River Walk) behind and below the store. The bramble is about 100 feet along on the right. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
